DemoSet Welcome to Demo DemoServiceAct Demo service No data Target: local service Target: remote service Exit direct use the service this is demo permission Ok Cancel Open window Hello floating dialog Hello BT BT on/off BT not support Ble not support Scan list: Paired list: Welcome to Demo nitification Notification message This is the result of the Demo notification Welcome to demo jni Invoke JNI to say hello Test: Object CallBack Test: Class CallBack Welcome to demo flash light On Off Flash light on/off Welcome to demo device admin Take picture Alarm count: 0 Start Stop Start Stop Play a: b: c: Execute Binder call (c=a+b) Welcome to Demo schedule Start counter Stop counter Reset DemoDatabaseAct Read permission This is used to read adam database This is used to write adam database No note Welcome to Demo system UI Dim Show Hide Start log Stop log Test Show this is test Welcome to demo table layout Input word... Paired Bt device name Bt address YYYY:MMM:DD Sample Update notification Cancel notification Set Alarm: setInexactRepeating(SdkVersion < API_19) setAndAllowWhileIdle(SdkVersion > API_19) setExactAndAllowWhileIdle(SdkVersion > API_19) setRepeating(SdkVersion < API_19) Hello job service demo Require: Idle Charging Network type require: None Any Set trigger interval type: Wifi No set Welcome to demo quick setting. To open the notification shade, swipe down from the top of the phone. Expand the setting and click the action menu to select the button order. dialog info turn on turn off cancel Time: Period: Second BT status Please input the non zero value... Welcome to demo Work Manager Select image This is image Image blur Title blurred More blurred The most blurred Cnacel Execute Result Offset Time: Result Login Name: Password: Next Cancel Title DemoMyHandlerThreadAct Execute Cancel Welcome to handler thread demo Wifi demo item No data Start scan Hello floating window Close window DemoXmlParserAct FileExploreAct Press Me Local file Usb file "⬆️ Parent folder" 🗂 %1$s 📄 %1$s We need your permission to access your files
 and display them to you Give permission You need to enable the requestLegacyExternalStorage
 flag in the AndroidManifest.xml file File Manager settings File Manager sample SDK codename: %1$s SDK version: %1$s Legacy External Storage: %1$s Permission used: %1$s Permission granted: %1$s Open settings Request permission Scan wifi Exit SSID BSSID Capabilities Frequency Level Please input password 12345678 please input delay number... Welcome to demo binder Help Login Username Password Remember Me Login Card view Test Item This is Toolbar Second page favorite favorite item search search item more more item Exit Hello Next Contained Button Text Button Outlined Button Button 1 Button 2 Button 3 You must increased the Interval Time to 15 minutes under this item otherwise the job service can not work. Welcome to quick setting demo. Info: Material Switch
Please input name Go to welcome page Welcome, %1$s！ please input nonempty string Demo view binding and press next button to go to the next activity Exit Demo data binding: You can see that the text view is changed by edit the name field. Input User ID load user data loading... This demo uses Kotlin coroutines with suspend and async to load user data asynchronously. Tap the button below to start. data from source 1 data from source 2 Result1: %1$s 
Result2: %2$s Enter a user ID and press Load Data.
This demonstrates Retrofit + Coroutine using suspend and async under the hood. User ID Load Data Waiting for result... User: %1$s (%2$s) Error: %1$s Unpair BT Pair BT Connect... BT is enable BT is disable BT adapter is valid... Messenger binder call AIDL binder call AIDL is configured. Messenger is configured. "I got the data from UI: " The result is overflow!!! Go to Setting Need notification permission We need notification permissions to remind you of important events, such as reminders, alerts, or background task completion. Please manually enable notification permissions in Settings. Need Overlay window permission We need this permission to display prompts or control panels. Please go to the settings page to enable it. System dialog Click the button to dismiss dialog Scan start Stop BLE Scan Try to connect: %1$s Lack of connection permissions Connect success: %1$s Connect failed: %1$s BONDED BONDING NONE Unknown Name: %1$s
 MAC address: %2$s
 State: %3$s Ble device infomation Bt is not supported Alarm count: %1$d Please config offset time first InValid input offset time!!! No this alarm function!!! Please input the value is large than 60 sec!!! Please input the value is large than 15 min!!! No file!!! Service is bound. Service is unBind. Service is not Bind yet. Game Start!!! You win! Game ended in a tie! Computer Win！ Loading... All permissions granted Some permissions denied Work task is Active Work task is Idle Time is arrived 2024 OCT 24 This is note content example Create note Save Update Note Update Cancel
 Option: Delete Service Monitor Remote service mode local service mode Please ensure that administrator privileges have been granted in the system settings. Click the button below to start the image blurring test. This is a custom GifView component that demonstrates how to play and control GIF animations using the Canvas and Movie categories. Function instruction: This page shows how to launch the "system-level" floating dialog box. After launching, the app will automatically close after 3 seconds, while the dialog box will remain on top of the screen until you tap "OK". Interaction Demo This is an advanced floating window demo. Once launched, a circular view appears in the center of the screen. You can change its position by "long-pressing and moving". This demonstrates the combined application of WindowManager and a custom Touch Strategy. Function instruction: This demo implements two background camera control modes: 1. JobIntentService: for immediate hardware operations. 2. WorkManager (Jetpack): for ensuring reliable task execution and observing state changes (observer pattern). Front lens Rear lens Camera2 API Video Streaming and Shooting Demonstration Please record first!!! Share Action Demo System share mechanism This page demonstrates the implementation of ShareActionProvider. It encapsulates plain text content using Intent.ACTION_SEND and automatically retrieves a list of applications within the system that can receive this data format. Please click the share icon on the ActionBar to test. "JNI info: %1$s" JNI Core Mechanism Demo This page demonstrates how Android calls low-level C++ libraries via the NDK. It includes: 
1. Java calling Native methods; 
2. Native posting data back to the Instance via reflection; 
3. Native updating Static (Class) variables. Waiting for native instructions... JNI function Call (Java -> Native) Instance CallBack (Native -> Obj) Static CallBack (Native -> Class) Object Callnack Static Callback JNI Demo Monitor
 Callback Log Clear Object Clear Class Binder IPC Demo AIDL (Method) Messenger (Handler) Input A input B (IPC Log): Send Binder Request
Compose Service Monitor
Service Running: Bound:
TRUE FALSE
Start Stop Bind Unbind Send
Service Started Service Stopped Service Bound Service Unbound Command Sent Service Status Controls HandlerThread Tech Demo This section demonstrates the core application of Android HandlerThread. By establishing a Looper in the background thread, asynchronous task processing is achieved and data is safely sent back to the UI thread. Background task progress count "" Times low light mode Hide interface Current status: Standard mode Current status: Immersive mode (full screen) Current status: Low brightness mode" Notification function demonstration This section demonstrates the core mechanisms of the Android notification system, including Channel creation, large image style updates, and PendingIntent navigation logic. This is crucial for medical alerts or system status notifications. You have successfully accessed this page by clicking the notification. This proves that the navigation logic of PendingIntent and TaskStackBuilder is working correctly. Notification updated This demonstrates how to dynamically modify the content of a sent notification. Info: test This is Demo text Equipment Safety Management Demonstration This unit demonstrates advanced permission control for Android Device Admin. Through the implementation of the Strategy Pattern, you can test the startup streams for remote screen locking, security authentication, and administrative permissions. This is crucial for the security maintenance of enterprise-level medical devices. This demo demonstrates several triggering mechanisms of AlarmManager: • Repeat: Strictly periodic alarm (requires > 60s) • Inexact: System-optimized power-saving mode (requires > 15min) • AllowWhileIdle: Can be triggered even in Doze mode XML Pull Parser Demo Parse XML resources using State Patterns and dynamically generate data lists. MVVM + Chain of Responsibility This demo demonstrates AI chess-playing logic implemented using the Chain of Responsibility pattern, and achieves automated UI refresh and winning path highlighting through Data Binding and ViewModel. The game begins! M3 Components Demo SYSTEM PARAMETER CONTROL Interactive Components The following components demonstrate how to drive the ViewModel and record system behavior through Data Binding. Toggle System State Single Selection Mode Debug Mode Release Mode Multi-select filters (Filter Chips) Sensor Data BLE Status Network CLEAR LOG System UI control panel This demo demonstrates how to use the WindowInsetsController API to control the display, hiding, and immersive behavior of the status bar and navigation bar. This is crucial for medical image viewing or full-screen game interfaces. The demo showcases WindowInsetsController controls. Content is adapted to the safe area to avoid being obscured by the system navigation bar. Animation display mode Confirmed username Please enter your name here to experience synchronization. The text below will update in real time as you type. Share content instantly
